name: 先婚後愛×破鏡重圓
name_en: Arranged Marriage to True Love × Reconciliation
description: 政治聯姻→五年無性婚姻→廢后→穿越後重新開始→互相了解→真情流露→復位。衝突核心在於權力、信任和真實自我的暴露，從制度性結合到真正的情感連結。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: Ever since you made me the queen, you have never touched me for 5 years... However, Laura Lake is the exception. When I am intimate with her, I don't feel disgusted... Since you rescued me, you must take full responsibility for me.
examples.context: 政治聯姻→五年無性婚姻→廢后→穿越後重新開始→互相了解→真情流露→復位。衝突核心在於權力、信任和真實自我的暴露，從制度性結合到真正的情感連結。
